issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases.
The skill is vendor-locked to SST and Node.js, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: Build a serverless REST API backed by DynamoDB with SST
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reached for raw CDK or legacy sst/constructs v2 syntax and hand-wrote IAM policies; treatment defined sst.aws.Dynamo and sst.aws.Function in sst.config.ts, used the link property to grant least-privilege access, accessed the table via Resource.Name in handlers, and ran sst dev for live local development.

scenarios.name: Deploy a Next.js app on AWS with isolated per-PR preview environments
scenarios.rationale: Baseline suggested SST OpenNext or generic CDK with no preview-stage workflow; treatment configured the sst.aws.Nextjs component with linked backend resources and wired CI to run sst deploy --stage pr-${PR_NUMBER} on open and sst remove --stage pr-${PR_NUMBER} on close as documented.
